eligible_benchmark_herb_requirements: at least one unique positive pair in the frozen positive universe
herb belongs to the frozen clean herb universe
herb belongs to exactly one split-blocking group
herb is not in benchmark quarantine
integer_target_rule: largest remainder method; equal remainders use train, validation, test order
forbidden_assignment_features: target identity or specific target-ID distribution

objective.positive_herb_count_deviation: For each side, absolute current or final count minus its frozen integer target.
objective.positive_edge_proportion_deviation: Sum over sides of abs(current or final side edges / all eligible edges - ratio).
objective.degree_bin_distribution_deviation: For each D01-D08 bin with nonzero global count, sum over sides of abs(side bin herbs / global bin herbs - ratio), then sum over bins.
objective.group_count_proportion_deviation: Sum over sides of abs(side group count / all assignable groups - ratio).
objective.assignment_signature: SHA-256 of LF-joined '<group_id>=<side>' records sorted by group ID; for partial greedy states include assigned groups only and no trailing LF.

initialization.decision_rule: choose the side producing the smallest complete lexicographic objective

local_improvement.acceptance: strict lexicographic improvement only; update immediately
local_improvement.pass_definition: one full move traversal followed by one full swap traversal
local_improvement.restart_rule: after a pass with any accepted change, begin the next pass from the start
local_improvement.stopping_rule: stop after the first complete pass with no accepted improvement

hard_invariants: each assignable group occurs on exactly one side
every benchmark-positive herb occurs on exactly one side
pure context-only groups are absent from the formal split
train, validation, and test sides are non-empty
validation and test each contain at least one group
single_execution_rule: Stage C2 executes once. If hard invariants pass, soft imbalance cannot justify a new seed or split.
